title: Sub-subcategories admin table: parent column 100% Unknown
status: fixed (defensive) — does not reproduce; audit symptom = silent parent-fetch failure
fix: GenericCrudManager: failed parent-list queries now surface a role=alert banner with Retry (data-testid alert-parent-load-failed / button-retry-parents) instead of silently rendering every parent as Unknown
subsubcategory-config: renders '—' when parent lists are empty/unloaded; 'Unknown' is reserved for genuinely dangling parent ids

evidence.normalLoad: 0 'Unknown' cells; parent APIs 200; 0 orphan parent ids across 106 sub-subcategories
evidence.forcedFailure: route-abort on parent APIs -> alert banner + Retry + 10 '—' rows, 0 'Unknown'
evidence.retry: clicking Retry after removing the abort recovers real parent names
